creator: mm@FreeBSD.org
text:
I agree with you in the COMMENT part, but not in the tclConfig.sh part.

The specification of tclConfig.sh says clearly, that TCL_SRC_DIR 
contains "Location of the top-level source directory from which Tcl was 
built."
The way to go if including the private headers is to patch the port to 
look at ${TCL_INCLUDEDIR}if it requires these only.
